name: INESA Intelligent Tech Inc.
summary: INESA Intelligent Tech Inc. operates as an information technology services company in China. It offers cloud computing and big data solutions that include infrastructure as a service, platform as a service, and software as a service; industry solutions, such as intelligent security, smart government, wisdom detection, smart water, wisdom education, and smart medical; and consumer, security, and special electronic products, as well as electronic detection products. The company was formerly known as INESA Electron Co., Ltd and changed its name to INESA Intelligent Tech Inc. in June 2016. INESA Intelligent Tech Inc. was founded in 1986 and is based in Shanghai, China.
